text: liquid water that falls from clouds to the ground
original_text: Rain is liquid water that falls from clouds to the ground.

text: rain forms when water droplets in clouds grow heavy enough to fall
original_text: Rain forms when water droplets in clouds grow heavy enough to fall.

text: helps supply freshwater to rivers, lakes, soil, and living things
original_text: Rain helps supply freshwater to rivers, lakes, soil, and living things.

text: too much rain can cause flooding, erosion, and storm damage
original_text: Too much rain can cause flooding, erosion, and storm damage.

text: the meatball sees rain as the sky spilling its drink
original_text: The meatball sees rain as the sky spilling its drink.
